'''''Saruwen Station''''' was a [[Bengel Shipbuilders]] [[XQ2 Platform]], operating as a trading post in deep space.

==History==
The station was chosen by the [[Azzameen family]] as a convenient place for a rendezvous between them and the [[SCT Scout craft|scout craft]] ''[[Ravenno]]'', representative of a smuggler dealing in black market [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]].

However, the bacta sale was merely a ruse designed by the [[Loose Cannon pirates]], who sought to entrap the Azzameens in an ambush at the cargo transfer area. Fortunately, the family fought their way out of the trap, and returned to their home base, again via Saruwen station.<ref name="XWA_POSG">[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
